winner.headline: Track Health, Master Your Day
winner.body: PulseBand Nova gives instant heart‑rate and sleep insights so you can stay energized, while quick phone notifications keep your schedule on track.

reason: Variant 1 states the primary benefit immediately, uses clear and warm language, avoids hype or superlatives, and focuses on practical, real‑world value for the user. It aligns best with the brand's honesty, clarity, and supportive tone.
